subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! After the veil was lifted, some clung to verses - We revealed verses - while others turned to clear proofs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل عالم بعد از کشف حجاب جمعی بایات متمسک آیات نازل نمودیم و برخی ببینات
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @contention and conflict, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
